parameters.query:
SELECT 
  a.id as "appointmentId", 
  a.start, 
  c.fullname as "customerName", 
  c.phone, 
  s.name as "salonName",
  'REMINDER_2H' as "reminderType"
FROM "Appointment" a
JOIN "Customer" c ON a."customerId" = c.id
JOIN "Salon" s ON a."salonId" = s.id
WHERE a.start BETWEEN NOW() + INTERVAL '2 hours' AND NOW() + INTERVAL '3 hours'
  AND a.status = 'CONFIRMED'
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM "NotificationLog" nl 
    WHERE nl."appointmentId" = a.id AND nl.type = 'REMINDER_2H'
  );

UNION ALL

SELECT 
  a.id as "appointmentId", 
  a.start, 
  c.fullname as "customerName", 
  c.phone, 
  s.name as "salonName",
  'REMINDER_24H' as "reminderType"
FROM "Appointment" a
JOIN "Customer" c ON a."customerId" = c.id
JOIN "Salon" s ON a."salonId" = s.id
WHERE a.start BETWEEN NOW() + INTERVAL '24 hours' AND NOW() + INTERVAL '25 hours'
  AND a.status = 'CONFIRMED'
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM "NotificationLog" nl 
    WHERE nl."appointmentId" = a.id AND nl.type = 'REMINDER_24H'
  );

UNION ALL

SELECT 
  a.id as "appointmentId", 
  a.start, 
  c.fullname as "customerName", 
  c.phone, 
  s.name as "salonName",
  'REMINDER_72H' as "reminderType"
FROM "Appointment" a
JOIN "Customer" c ON a."customerId" = c.id
JOIN "Salon" s ON a."salonId" = s.id
WHERE a.start BETWEEN NOW() + INTERVAL '72 hours' AND NOW() + INTERVAL '73 hours'
  AND a.status = 'CONFIRMED'
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM "NotificationLog" nl 
    WHERE nl."appointmentId" = a.id AND nl.type = 'REMINDER_72H'
  );

SELECT 
  c.id as "customerId", 
  c.fullname as "customerName", 
  c.phone, 
  'BIRTHDAY_7D' as "campaignType"
FROM "Customer" c
WHERE EXTRACT(MONTH FROM c.birthday) = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM (NOW() + INTERVAL '7 days'))
  AND EXTRACT(DAY FROM c.birthday) = EXTRACT(DAY FROM (NOW() + INTERVAL '7 days'))
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM "NotificationLog" nl 
    WHERE nl."customerId" = c.id AND nl.type = 'BIRTHDAY_7D' 
    AND nl."sentAt" > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '300 days'
  )

UNION ALL

SELECT 
  c.id as "customerId", 
  c.fullname as "customerName", 
  c.phone, 
  'BIRTHDAY_TODAY' as "campaignType"
FROM "Customer" c
WHERE EXTRACT(MONTH FROM c.birthday) = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM NOW())
  AND EXTRACT(DAY FROM c.birthday) = EXTRACT(DAY FROM NOW())
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM "NotificationLog" nl 
    WHERE nl."customerId" = c.id AND nl.type = 'BIRTHDAY_TODAY' 
    AND nl."sentAt" > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '300 days'
  );

SELECT 
  c.id as "customerId", 
  c.fullname as "customerName", 
  c.phone,
  'WINBACK_45D' as "campaignType"
FROM "Customer" c
LEFT JOIN "Appointment" a ON a."customerId" = c.id
GROUP BY c.id
HAVING MAX(a.start) < NOW() - INTERVAL '45 days'
  AND MAX(a.start) > NOW() - INTERVAL '46 days'
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM "NotificationLog" nl 
    WHERE nl."customerId" = c.id AND nl.type = 'WINBACK' 
    AND nl."sentAt" > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
  );
